Once upon a time there was a little white duck.

Every day she floated gracefully along the sparkling waters...

Oh!

There was a big majestic eagle soaring high...

Oooooh!

And...

There was a beautiful meowa…

Oh…

Oh my!

That must be a…

A…

A…

Ooh!

A black...

A turkey?

Oh!


That's not...

A

A penguin?

Oh!

It feels…

Oh...

A...

I think you meant a…

Oh!

A turkey!

Asking?

Certainly…

Uh-huh...

An interesting…

A…

Or...

A cow!

That could…

Oh…

You're thinking?

A cow thinks?

Oh!

Certainly...

A cow thinks about…
